channel.title: Benchmark PS Blog
channel.description: Practical insights on physiotherapy outcomes, MSK measurement, and evidence-based practice.

item.title: Why Physiotherapy Clinics That Measure Outcomes Retain More Patients (and Charge More)
item.description: Data shows clinics using outcome measurement see 25% higher retention and command premium fees. Learn why measurement drives patient loyalty and revenue.

item.title: The Business Case for Outcome Measurement in Physiotherapy Clinics
item.description: Discover how objective outcome measurement transforms physiotherapy clinics through improved patient outcomes, clinical efficiency, and business sustainability.

item.title: How to Implement Objective Physiotherapy Assessment Without Expensive Equipment
item.description: Implement objective physiotherapy assessment in your practice using practical, low-cost tools. Evidence-based strategies for standardised testing without expensive equipment.

item.title: MSK Outcome Benchmarks: What Good Conservative Care Actually Looks Like
item.description: Evidence-based MSK outcome benchmarks reveal what effective conservative care looks like. Learn the measurable standards that separate good physiotherapy from average.

item.title: Evidence-Based Progression in Physiotherapy: A Framework for Time-Pressured Clinicians
item.description: A practical framework for evidence-based progression in physiotherapy that fits into real clinical workflows without compromising quality or patient outcomes.

item.title: Why 43% of Physiotherapy Care Is Non-Recommended — and What Clinics Can Do About It
item.description: Research shows 43% of physiotherapy care deviates from guidelines. Learn why this happens and how standardised assessment can improve clinical outcomes.

item.title: Staffing Mix and Physiotherapy Margins: How Standardised Care Reduces Senior Clinician Dependency
item.description: How standardised physiotherapy protocols reduce dependency on senior clinicians, improve staffing efficiency, and boost practice margins without compromising care quality.

item.title: ACL Return-to-Sport Testing: Which Criteria Actually Predict Re-Injury Risk
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of ACL return-to-sport testing criteria that actually predict re-injury risk. Learn which assessments matter for safe sport return.

item.title: The State of Technology in Physiotherapy: What Works, What Doesn't, and What's Coming
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of physiotherapy technology: what works in clinical practice, common pitfalls to avoid, and emerging trends that will shape MSK care.

item.title: The Economic Case for Better MSK Conservative Care
item.description: The economic burden of MSK conditions demands better conservative care. Evidence-based strategies to reduce costs while improving patient outcomes.

item.title: Knee Osteoarthritis and Conservative Care: Setting Realistic Expectations With Objective Data
item.description: Evidence-based approach to knee osteoarthritis care: using objective data to set realistic expectations and improve conservative treatment outcomes.
